data.headline: No Trading Activity; Portfolio Underperforming Benchmark
data.summary: End-of-day portfolio status: Cash position of $1,000,000 with zero holdings and 0% return. SPY benchmark advanced 0.0523% today while the portfolio remained flat, resulting in -0.0523% alpha underperformance. No trades executed across 2 decision points. Portfolio equity maintained at $1,000,000. Process consumed $0.010412 USD and 7,012 tokens; 1 refusal was generated during the decision-making process.
data.risk_note: Portfolio remains fully in cash with no market exposure. Underperformance vs. SPY driven entirely by lack of equity allocation. Operational refusal event warrants review for decision logic constraints.
